title: Single cell transcriptional analysis reveals novel innate immune cell types.
author: Kippner LE Kim J Gibson G Kemp ML
content: S-EPMC4081288 PMC4081288 Single cell transcriptional analysis reveals novel innate immune cell types. Single-cell analysis has the potential to provide us with a host of new knowledge about biological systems, but it comes with the challenge of correctly interpreting the biological information
